prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - carbohydrate loading with sustained energy for high-mileage week

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus snacks for one complete day
Emphasizes carbohydrates (55-65% of calories) to support endurance training
Total daily calories align with marathon runner's high energy expenditure (3000-3500 kcal range)
Includes specific food items and portion sizes for practical implementation
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for an athlete
scenario: Testing with a lightweight endurance athlete (marathon runner) with high caloric needs, minimal restrictions, and focus on carbohydrate-loading and sustained energy

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle building with high protein intake for strength training

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals for 1 day with vegan protein sources meeting ~2.2g protein per kg bodyweight (~210g total)
Includes specific food items and portions that are realistic and achievable
Addresses caloric needs appropriate for a heavyweight strength athlete in a muscle-building phase
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for an athlete
scenario: Testing with a heavyweight strength-focused athlete (bodybuilder) with specific muscle-building macro requirements and multiple dietary restrictions (vegan/vegetarian)

prompt_inputs.goal: maintain energy and performance for early morning tennis training and matches
prompt_inputs.restrictions: severe peanut allergy; requires alternative protein and fat sources

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals and accounts for early morning training schedule
All meals are peanut-free with creative substitutions for protein and healthy fats
Plan is compact and concise (suitable for quick reference)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for an athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific scenario: a professional tennis player with moderate build, early morning training schedule, and an allergy-based dietary restriction that requires creative meal substitutions
